enabled.title: Enable drag-and-drop path insertion
enabled.description: Master switch. When off, dragging a file or folder onto a terminal, editor or notebook does nothing.

pathType.title: Path type
pathType.description: Whether dropped paths are absolute, or relative to the terminal cwd / the open document directory.

pythonPathStyle.title: Python path style
pythonPathStyle.description: How a path is inserted into a Python file or notebook code cell: 'posix' inserts a quoted path string, 'pathlib' inserts a pathlib constructor expression.

pathlibConstructor.title: Pathlib constructor
pathlibConstructor.description: The constructor used when 'Python path style' is 'pathlib'.
